content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 ALM Corp: Senior Manager – Performance Marketing (Google Ads) Anywhere in the World Ontario Paid Social Media Advertising, PPC, Google Ads, PPC Management, and PPC Campaigns Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0170/8938/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Toronto, Canada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.almcorp.com">https://www.almcorp.com</a> </p> <p>ALM Corp is a full-service digital marketing agency specializing in SEO, AI-driven content optimization, and performance marketing. We partner with American small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) across a wide range of industries to build scalable, data-led campaigns that drive measurable growth. As we expand our paid media capabilities, we’re looking for a strategic leader with deep agency experience to own our Google Ads practice and mentor a high-performing team. Our website is www.almcorp.com.</p> <p>We are hiring a Senior Manager – Performance Marketing (Google Ads) to lead and scale our Google Ads department. You will be directly responsible for a team of 15 performance marketers, overseeing campaign strategy, execution, and profitability across a diverse portfolio of American SMB client accounts spanning multiple industries. This is a player-coach role: you will guide the team’s professional growth while staying hands-on with high-stakes accounts and strategic initiatives.</p> <p>The position is remote and you can be located anywhere globally. Prior agency experience is mandatory for this role.</p> <p>What You’ll Do</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Leadership &amp; Team Management</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 15 Google Ads specialists, including account managers, strategists, and analysts.</li> <li>Set clear KPIs, conduct performance reviews, and foster a culture of accountability, experimentation, and continuous learning.</li> <li>Recruit, onboard, and retain top-tier paid search talent.</li> </ul> <p>Strategy &amp; Execution</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Own the Google Ads P&amp;L for the department; ensure SMB client campaigns across various industries are profitable, scalable, and aligned with business goals.</li> <li>Develop and enforce best-practice frameworks for account structure, bidding strategies, audience segmentation, and creative testing tailored to SMB budgets and goals.</li> <li>Oversee Search, PMAX, Display, YouTube, and Remarketing campaigns across diverse B2B and B2C verticals for American SMBs.</li> </ul> <p>Client &amp; Commercial Growth</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Act as the senior escalation point for complex SMB client challenges and strategic reviews across different industries.</li> <li>Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities (e.g., Analytics, CRO, SEO) in collaboration with other ALM Corp service lines.</li> <li>Partner with the leadership team to set pricing, packaging, and margin targets for SMB-focused Google Ads services.</li> </ul> <p>Innovation &amp; Process</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Stay ahead of Google Ads product updates, AI-driven automation (e.g., PMAX, Gen AI assets), and privacy-centric measurement shifts.</li> <li>Build and maintain scalable workflows, QA processes, and reporting dashboards that improve team efficiency and SMB client transparency.</li> <li>Champion a test-and-learn culture; allocate budget for R&amp;D pilots and new beta features.</li> </ul> <p>What You Bring</p> <p>Required</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Mandatory prior agency experience — this role requires a proven background working within a digital marketing agency environment.</li> <li>7+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns</li> <li>3+ years in a people-management role, ideally leading a team of 10+ in an agency or high-growth in-house environment.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience managing American SMB accounts across multiple industries.</li> <li>Deep expertise in Google Ads Editor, Google Analytics 4, and Looker Studio (or equivalent BI tools).</li> <li>Proven track record of improving ROAS/CPA, scaling accounts, and retaining SMB client revenue.</li> <li>Strong grasp of attribution modeling, conversion tracking, and first-party data strategies.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills; comfortable presenting to SMB business owners and stakeholders.</li> </ul> <p>Preferred</p> <ul class="_1dc204d6 _58a26793 _7b2ee40b"> <li>Google Ads certifications (Search, Display, Video, Measurement, and Shopping).</li> <li>Experience with feed management platforms, SQL, or BigQuery for advanced reporting.</li> <li>Background in diverse SMB verticals including B2B lead generation, e-commerce, professional services, or local business campaigns.</li> <li>Familiarity with AI-assisted campaign management and LLM-optimized ad creative workflows.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/alm-corp-senior-manager-performance-marketing-google-ads">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/alm-corp-senior-manager-performance-marketing-google-ads</a></p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Sweden <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://career.proxify.io">http://career.proxify.io</a> </p> <h3><strong>The Role:</strong></h3> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We are looking for a Senior Fullstack Python Developer to join our fast-growing Network.</p> <p>In this role, you’ll lead the design and implementation of scalable backend services and APIs using Python (FastAPI, Django, or Flask), while delivering polished, performant user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks such as React.js or Vue.js.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h4><strong>What we are looking for:</strong></h4> <ul> <li>5+ years of professional software development experience with strong fullstack exposure.</li> <li>3+ years of production experience with Python (FastAPI, Django, Flask).</li> <li>Solid knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3.</li> <li>Strong experience with React.js or Vue.js (or similar modern frameworks such as Next.js/Nuxt.js).</li> <li>Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and ORMs such as SQLAlchemy or Django ORM.</li> <
